tasks.title: Bump seed schema to v4
tasks.description: Update seed-schema.json from v3 to v4. Changes: (1) open_threads changes from string[] to [{id: string, text: string, first_seen_iteration: number}], (2) new disposed_threads field [{id: string, text: string, disposition: 'decided'|'deferred'|'rejected', iteration: number}], (3) new iteration integer field (documentation/telemetry only), (4) new verification field {iteration: number, personas: string[], refutations_upheld: number, clean: boolean, status: 'verified'|'degraded'}. Update schema_version const from '3' to '4'. Update seed-contract.md to describe the new fields. Add a v4 conformant example to the schema's examples array.
acceptance_criteria: seed-schema.json schema_version const is '4'
open_threads property is an array of objects with id, text, first_seen_iteration required fields
disposed_threads property exists with id, text, disposition (enum: decided/deferred/rejected), iteration required fields
iteration property exists as integer type
verification property exists with iteration, personas (string[]), refutations_upheld (integer), clean (boolean), status (enum: verified/degraded) required fields
A v4 example seed in the schema's examples array passes validate-schema.sh --self-test
seed-contract.md accurately describes all four new fields

tasks.title: Register persona agents and update model-tiers
tasks.description: Create 5 registered agent definition files under claude-code-shared/agents/personas/: 4 adversary personas (grounding, accuracy, completeness, coherence) and 1 judge. Each persona file's body is its sub-lens checklist (what to attack and how). Grounding hunts unsupported content and fabricated rationale. Accuracy hunts semantic drift and stale-resolution. Completeness hunts missed branches, premature closure, dropped dependencies, and merge-loss (auto-extended on Mode 2). Coherence hunts contradiction, misclassification, and dropped human dispositions, including relabel-resurrection checks against the disposed_threads lock list. The judge file defines the evidence-bound adjudicator spawned 3x for the 2-of-3 vote. Update agents/registry.json with all 5 entries (4 personas Haiku tier, judge Sonnet tier). Update resources/model-tiers.json: add 4 persona agents at T1 and the judge agent at T3. Verify whether the harness agent loader discovers agents in subdirectories (agents/personas/*.md) or only flat agents/*.md; if flat-only, place all 5 files flat under agents/ instead of in the personas/ subdirectory.
acceptance_criteria: 5 agent definition files exist (either at agents/personas/ or flat under agents/ depending on loader discovery)
Each adversary persona file contains its sub-lens checklist as the body
registry.json includes all 5 new entries with correct file paths and descriptions
model-tiers.json agents section includes 4 persona entries at T1 and 1 judge entry at T3
Spawning a persona agent by name (e.g. subagent_type: 'personas/grounding') resolves without error, or flat names work if loader is flat-only

tasks.title: Add to-seed verification stage
tasks.description: Add an internal atomic verification stage to to-seed SKILL.md that runs after synthesis drafts the seed in memory and before anything is written to disk. Pipeline order: (1) synthesis runs first and populates all fields including open_threads; synthesis also mints the disposed-id lock list from its output (establishing the lock before any adversary agent spawns). (2) Spawn all 4 adversary persona agents in parallel, each receiving the draft seed plus the disposed-id lock list as a hard constraint. Each persona follows its sub-lens checklist and returns refutations with cited transcript spans. (3) For each refutation, spawn 3 judge instances simultaneously, each checking the citation against the actual transcript. Flat 2-of-3 majority decides whether the refutation is upheld. (4) Apply upheld refutations to the draft seed (additions auto-apply; removals require cited evidence per the adversarial framing decision). (5) Build the verification stamp: {iteration, personas: [list of persona names run], refutations_upheld: count, clean: upheld-count === 0, status: 'verified'}. (6) Write the seed with the verification stamp. Failure handling: on any agent erroring or timing out, retry that single agent once silently, then notify the user with the specific failure. User chooses retry-again or save-as-is, which writes the seed with status: 'degraded'. Abort is never an option.
acceptance_criteria: to-seed SKILL.md includes the verification stage between synthesis and file-write
Sticky-lock pipeline order is explicit: synthesis mints lock list before any persona agent spawns
All 4 adversary personas are spawned in parallel by registered agent name, not by file path
Judge is spawned 3 times with flat 2-of-3 majority logic documented
Adversarial framing is documented: panel's job is to disprove, additions auto-apply, removals need cited evidence
Verification stamp shape matches the schema: {iteration, personas[], refutations_upheld, clean, status}
Retry-once-then-notify failure path is present for both persona and judge failures
Degraded save path writes verification.status: 'degraded' when user chooses save-as-is
A smoke test confirms the skill text references all 4 persona agent names correctly

tasks.title: Replace draft gate with three-option AskUserQuestion
tasks.description: Update to-seed SKILL.md to replace the current draft gate behavior. After the seed is written and adjudicated, if open_threads is non-empty, present a single AskUserQuestion with exactly three options: (1) continue with grill-me, (2) continue with grill-with-docs, (3) stop and write handoff. Continue options tail-call the selected grill skill via Skill() with the seed path as resume payload and write NO handoff doc (live context is the handoff). The stop option is the only path that writes a handoff doc, for the cross-window case. There is no fourth 'abandon without handoff' option. The seed itself is always written and adjudicated before the gate appears.
acceptance_criteria: to-seed SKILL.md draft gate section presents exactly three options
No 'abandon without handoff' option is present
Continue options tail-call the grill skill via Skill() with no handoff write
Stop option writes a handoff before terminating
Gate only appears after seed is written and adjudicated (comes after verification stage from T-0003)
Gate only appears when open_threads is non-empty (ready seeds bypass the gate)

tasks.title: Grill resume contract and handoff block extension
tasks.description: Update both grill-me/SKILL.md and grill-with-docs/SKILL.md with the resume contract. When a doc path (seed or handoff) is passed as argument, exactly three exits apply: (a) seed/handoff has open_threads → resume mode: drill only the open_threads, load disposed_threads as the off-limits lock list for the session; (b) open_threads is empty (status ready) → stop immediately, tell user the seed is solidified, suggest downstream skills (/to-tasks); (c) path is unreadable or missing → say so plainly, ask what the user wants. Never a silent re-grill of an already-resolved seed. Grill resume mode reads the disposed_threads lock list and treats those ids as off-limits throughout the session. Relabel-resurrection (a locked thread re-raised under a different name) is also blocked. Update the handoff doc template in to-seed to extend the ## Seed Context block to carry the full open_threads object array (with ids) and the disposed_threads lock list. Update grill-with-docs mode-awareness: fresh grill reads decisions from live conversation only (the existing guard); resume grill loads seed/handoff decisions as settled givens and open_threads as the live agenda.
acceptance_criteria: grill-me SKILL.md documents all three resume-mode exits
grill-with-docs SKILL.md documents all three resume-mode exits
Both skills load disposed_threads as an off-limits lock list on resume
grill-with-docs fresh-vs-resume mode distinction is explicitly documented
to-seed handoff template ## Seed Context block includes open_threads (object array with ids) and disposed_threads
Resume trigger is defined as argument-presence detection, not schema validation

tasks.title: Add shared dimension-list resource
tasks.description: Create a new shared resource file at claude-code-shared/resources/soft-dimension-list.md. Content is the starter set of soft dimensions sketched in the grill (data model, state transitions, failure modes, boundaries/contracts, dependencies/ordering, human touch points, scope/out-of-scope, reversibility/migration), clearly marked as DRAFT and data-gated pending instrumentation. The file must include a prominent note that its contents must not be tuned without measurement data. Update both grill-me/SKILL.md and grill-with-docs/SKILL.md to reference this resource file as non-binding anti-rabbit-hole guidance (soft, not prescriptive). The decision to have the list and share it across both skills is locked; the contents are explicitly provisional.
acceptance_criteria: resources/soft-dimension-list.md exists with the starter dimension set
File prominently states it is DRAFT and data-gated
grill-me SKILL.md references the file as soft, non-binding guidance
grill-with-docs SKILL.md references the file as soft, non-binding guidance
Neither skill inlines the dimension list content (reference only, no duplication)

tasks.title: Rename source.kind to source.type across all JSON contracts and instances
tasks.description: Rename the 'kind' key to 'type' in all 'source' objects across JSON contracts, instance files, validation scripts, and skill docs. Core change is in provenance-schema.json where the property is defined. Cascade to all consumers. Files in scope: (1) claude-code-shared/contracts/provenance-schema.json — rename the 'kind' property to 'type' in the source object definition; (2) claude-code-shared/contracts/task-schema.json and seed-schema.json — update any inline references to source.kind; (3) all existing JSON instance files that carry source.kind: docs/tasks/20260604-0044-harden-ideation-loop-pipeline.json, docs/seeds/20260603-2312-harden-ideation-loop-pipeline.json, docs/seeds/20260604-0008-harden-ideation-loop-pipeline.json; (4) claude-code-shared/scripts/validate-schema.py — update test case key names; (5) all SKILL.md files that reference source.kind in prose or examples: to-seed, to-tasks, tasks-to-linear, to-prd-html, code-review, improve-component, to-e2e-tasks, clean-scaffolding, debug. After all edits run validate-schema.sh --self-test to confirm no schema violations. Grep the repo to confirm zero remaining occurrences of '"kind"' inside any source object.
acceptance_criteria: provenance-schema.json defines the source discriminator as 'type' not 'kind'
task-schema.json and seed-schema.json contain no reference to source.kind
All existing task and seed JSON instance files use source.type not source.kind
validate-schema.py test cases use 'type' not 'kind' in source fixture objects
All SKILL.md files that previously referenced source.kind now reference source.type
grep -r '"kind"' across contracts/ and docs/ returns zero matches inside source objects
validate-schema.sh --self-test passes after all changes

tasks.title: Gate to-tasks on verification.status
tasks.description: Update to-tasks SKILL.md to add a verification gate for v4 seeds. After loading the seed and confirming status is 'ready' (existing draft check), also check for schema_version '4' seeds: if verification.status is 'degraded', hard-refuse with a clear error message. Message should state that the seed was saved in degraded verification state (the adversary panel did not complete), that the user must re-run to-seed to trigger a full panel run, and that to-tasks cannot safely generate tasks from an unverified seed. Seeds with verification.status 'verified' proceed normally. Seeds without a verification field (v3 and earlier schema_version) also proceed normally for backward compatibility.
acceptance_criteria: to-tasks SKILL.md includes the verification.status check after the draft-seed check
The error message for status:'degraded' names the root cause and the remediation step
Seeds with verification.status:'verified' proceed through the gate without error
Seeds with no verification field (v3) proceed through the gate without error (backward compat)
Degraded-check is only applied to seeds where schema_version is '4'

follow_ups.title: Validate agent loader discovers agents/personas/ subdirectory
steps: After T-0002 is merged, open Claude Code and run a session that spawns one of the new persona agents by subagent_type name (e.g. subagent_type: 'personas/grounding' or 'grounding' depending on T-0002 findings)
If the agent resolves successfully, the subdirectory path is confirmed and no further action is needed
If the agent fails to resolve, move all 5 persona agent files from agents/personas/ to agents/ (flat), update registry.json file paths accordingly, and re-test

follow_ups.title: Run sync-model-tiers after model-tiers.json update
steps: After T-0002 is merged, run: python ~/.dotfiles/claude-code-shared/scripts/sync-model-tiers.py --apply
Confirm the 5 new persona/judge agent entries propagate correctly to all consuming skill files
Commit any changes the sync script writes

follow_ups.title: Migrate or re-run any existing v3 draft seeds before they are consumed by updated to-seed
steps: For each v3 seed found, check if it has open_threads (string array format) that need migration
If a v3 seed is in active use, re-run /to-seed on the original grill handoff to produce a v4 seed; do not manually migrate the open_threads array format
Purge stale draft seeds by running /clean-scaffolding after the new to-seed is deployed
